auth_note: All endpoints require JWT auth + ADMIN role. Use seeded admin user. All data scoped by companyId from JWT.

test_data_prerequisites.seeded_models: 3 AiModel records from E5 seed (claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5)
test_data_prerequisites.seeded_automations: 1 example automation from E5c-1 seed (Daily AR Aging Summary)

test_execution_order: 1. Run all POST (create) tests first to establish test data
2. Run all GET (list/detail) tests using created data
3. Run all PATCH (update) tests on created data
4. Run all DELETE tests last to clean up
5. Within each group, run happy_path tests before validation_error and edge_case tests

cross_cutting_tests.name: All endpoints reject unauthenticated requests (401)
cross_cutting_tests.description: Send request without Authorization header to every endpoint. Expect 401 for all.

cross_cutting_tests.name: All admin endpoints reject non-admin users (403)
cross_cutting_tests.description: Send request with a non-ADMIN JWT to every /ai/admin/* endpoint. Expect 403.

cross_cutting_tests.name: Company isolation - automations scoped by companyId
cross_cutting_tests.description: Create automation as company A, then try to read/update/delete it as company B. Expect 404.

cross_cutting_tests.name: List endpoints return within 500ms (NFR2)
cross_cutting_tests.description: Measure response time for all paginated list endpoints. All must return within 500ms.

cross_cutting_tests.name: Cursor-based pagination works correctly
cross_cutting_tests.description: For each list endpoint: (1) fetch page 1 with limit=2, (2) use nextCursor to fetch page 2, (3) verify no duplicate items across pages.
